DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR DEEMED ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED. THE MATTERS SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AND GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED.
